role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of text; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed forest types and canopy structure.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings and guardrail infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (camera quality, pole style) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed a high-quality analysis of the visual evidence, correctly identifying the biome and infrastructure as Southeast Asian. However, it failed to identify Panama (the ground truth) as a candidate, instead defaulting to Thailand based on strong but non-exclusive visual cues (yellow center line, guardrail style).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described tropical deciduous forest and rolling hills.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Accurately described the mixed canopy structure.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the yellow center line and W-beam guardrail.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described the utility pole and image quality.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: Panama was not included in the candidate pool (Path B was constrained to Southeast Asia, South America, etc., but Panama was not selected as a specific country candidate).
